name: desktop-screenshot-translate-electron
author: AiTrans
description: Windows MVP Electron shell for AiTrans screenshot translation.

scripts.dev:doctor: npm run doctor && npm run dev
scripts.pack:win:raw: npm run materialize:project && npm run panel:build && npm run release:check && electron-builder --win portable -c.artifactName=desktop-screenshot-translate-${version}-${arch}-portable.${ext}
scripts.dist:win:raw: npm run materialize:project && npm run panel:build && npm run release:check && electron-builder --win nsis
scripts.pack:win: npm run clean:dist && npm run pack:win:raw
scripts.dist:win: npm run clean:dist && npm run dist:win:raw
scripts.release:win: npm run clean:dist && npm run dist:win:raw && npm run pack:win:raw && npm run release:manifest
scripts.check: node --check main.js && node --check preload.js && node --check lib/project-config.js && node --check lib/window-state.js && node --check lib/local-pipeline.js && node --check lib/provider-runtime.js && node --check lib/runtime-overrides.js && node --check lib/ocr-adapters.js && node --check lib/translation-adapters.js && node --check lib/windows-focus.js && node --check lib/update-runtime.js && node --check renderer/overlay/overlay.js && node --check renderer/setup/setup.js && node --check scripts/clean-dist.js && node --check scripts/doctor.js && node --check scripts/materialize-project.js && node --check scripts/release-check.js && node --check scripts/release-manifest.js && node --check scripts/stage-tesseract.js && vite build --config vite.panel.config.mjs
